DescribeAlarmNotifyHistories.document: Query alarm notification history as needed
DescribeAlarmNotifyHistories.name: This API is used to query alarm notification history.

Sending result. Valid values: 0, (invalid), 1 (successful), 2 (failed), and 3 (no sending required).
Note: This field may return null, indicating that no valid values can be obtained.

members.name: MonitorType
